title: Deliciously Garlicky Irish Potato Stew
description: A hearty and flavorful stew featuring garlicky potatoes, perfect for a lazy Sunday, and made without eggs for an egg-free friendly meal.

ingredients.name: candy
ingredients.notes: such as peppermints or lemon drops, crushed

instructions: In a large pot, melt the butter over medium heat.
Add the chopped onions and cook until they are softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional 1 minute, until fragrant.
Add the diced potatoes, sliced carrots, and ground black pepper, stirring to combine.
Pour in the beef broth and bring the mixture to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low and simmer, covered, until the potatoes are tender, about 20 minutes.
Stir in the crushed candy and cook for an additional 2 minutes, until the candy is melted and the stew is heated through.
Season the stew with salt to taste, then serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh parsley.
